does_not_provide_proof_of_belgian_nation.name: does_not_provide_proof_of_belgian_nationality
does_not_provide_proof_of_belgian_nation.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

not_union_citizen.name: not_union_citizen
not_union_citizen.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

not_covered_by_eu_free_movement_law.name: not_covered_by_eu_free_movement_law
not_covered_by_eu_free_movement_law.description: The person is not covered by EU free movement law.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_condition.name: does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_conditions
does_not_satisfy_entry_or_stay_condition.description: The person does not or no longer satisfies the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_or_transfer_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The person is subject to a procedure determining or transferring to the member state responsible for examining an international protection request.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person has been performed.

all_case_circumstances_considered.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
all_case_circumstances_considered.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

current_and_real_reasons_to_assume_absco.name: current_and_real_reasons_to_assume_absconding
current_and_real_reasons_to_assume_absco.description: There are current and real reasons to assume that the person will abscond.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: After illegal entry or during illegal stay, the person did not submit a residence application.

international_protection_request_late.name: international_protection_request_late
international_protection_request_late.description: The person did not make the request for international protection within the time limit provided by law.

used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or forged documents in a relevant procedure.

committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means
committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.name: failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_authorities
failed_to_cooperate_with_immigration_aut.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, stay, establishment, or removal rules.

declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with a transfer, refusal of entry, or removal measure.

declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_unsuspended_entry_ban
declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with a less coercive measure intended to guarantee transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_public_order_or_national_security_restrictive_measure
declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with a restrictive measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.name: declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
declared_unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_w.description: The person made clear unwillingness or failed to comply with an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban
subject_to_unsuspended_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

new_application_immediately_after_refusa.name: new_application_immediately_after_refusal_end_or_removal_decision
new_application_immediately_after_refusa.description: The person submitted a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, end-of-stay decision, refusal-of-entry measure, or removal measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsible_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.description: When questioned, the person concealed having already given fingerprints in another state bound by the rules on determining the responsible state.

multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_title_outcome
multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.description: The person submitted multiple international protection requests or residence applications in relevant states that led to negative decisions or no residence title.

concealed_prior_international_protection.name: concealed_prior_international_protection_request_in_responsible_state
concealed_prior_international_protection.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection request in another state bound by the rules on determining the responsible state.

came_for_purposes_other_than_application.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application
came_for_purposes_other_than_application.description: The person declared or the file shows that the person came for purposes other than those of the international protection request or residence application.

fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal.name: fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal.description: The person is subject to a fine for lodging a manifestly unlawful appeal before the competent tribunal.

has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_do.name: has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_document
has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_do.description: The person possesses a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passe.name: recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passer_promised
recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passe.description: The national authority of the person's country recognized the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

nationality_category_allows_minister_lai.name: nationality_category_allows_minister_laissez_passer
nationality_category_allows_minister_lai.description: The person falls under a nationality category for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer.

subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure.name: subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure
subject_to_absconding_relevant_procedure.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

absconding_objective_criterion_met.name: absconding_objective_criterion_met
absconding_objective_criterion_met.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

is_in_illegal_stay.name: is_in_illegal_stay
is_in_illegal_stay.description: The person is legally considered to be in illegal stay.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: A statutory risk of absconding is legally established for the person.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.
